# social.plus SDK

> social.plus is a feature-rich SDK for building chat, communities, feeds, and social experiences. This document provides AI-consumable documentation for the core Chat and Social SDK surfaces.

## Chat — Channels

- [Channel Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/overview): Create, manage, and organize chat channels with comprehensive lifecycle support
- [Create Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/create-channel): Build structured chat experiences by creating community, live, and conversation channels with custom configurations
- [Get Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/get-channel): Retrieve individual channels or query multiple channels by ID with real-time updates and live object support
- [Query Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/query-channels): Search and retrieve channels based on various criteria including display name, tags, membership status, and channel type
- [Update Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/update-channel): Modify channel properties including display name, avatar, tags, and metadata to keep channel information current and relevant
- [Archive Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/archive-channels): Archive and unarchive conversation channels to organize your chat list while preserving message history and functionality

## Chat — Channel Governance

- [Member Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/member-management): Add, remove, and manage channel membership to control who can participate in chat channels.
- [Role Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/role-management): Manage channel roles and permissions to control user access levels and moderation capabilities within chat channels.
- [Ban Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/ban-management): Ban and unban channel members to restrict access for users who violate community guidelines.
- [Mute Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/mute-management): Mute and unmute channel members to restrict messaging while allowing read-only participation.

## Chat — Members

- [Join & Leave Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/join-leave-channel): Manage channel membership by joining and leaving channels, with real-time membership status monitoring and idempotent operations
- [Query Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/query-members): Search and retrieve channel members with advanced filtering by membership status, roles, and sorting options
- [Preview Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/preview-members): Get a quick preview of up to 4 channel members for conversation and community channels

## Chat — Messaging

- [Send a Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/send-a-message): Comprehensive guide to sending messages with real-time synchronization, state management, and robust error handling
- [Text Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/text-message): Send formatted text messages with rich content support including mentions, formatting, and metadata
- [Image Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/image-message): Send image messages with captions, metadata, and automatic upload handling across all platforms
- [File Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/file-message): Share documents, attachments, and files with automatic upload handling, format validation, and cross-platform compatibility
- [Audio Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/audio-message): Send voice recordings and audio content with automatic processing, format optimization, and cross-platform compatibility
- [Video Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/video-message): Send video messages with automatic processing, thumbnail generation, and cross-platform compatibility
- [Custom Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/custom-message): Create flexible custom message types with structured JSON data for polls, location sharing, interactive content, and specialized use cases
- [Reply to a Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/reply-to-a-message): Create threaded conversations by replying to existing messages with support for text, media, and custom content types
- [Edit and Delete Messages](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/edit-and-delete-messages): Modify and remove your own messages with proper permissions, audit trails, and user notifications for chat content management
- [Get and View a Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/get-and-view-a-message): Retrieve and display messages with comprehensive content handling for text, media, files, and custom message types
- [Query and Filter Messages](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/query-and-filter-messages): Retrieve and filter messages from channels with advanced querying capabilities, sorting options, and real-time updates for dynamic chat experiences.
- [Flag and Unflag Messages](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/flag-unflag-a-message): Implement message flagging and moderation capabilities in social.plus SDK for community safety and content management

## Chat — Engagement

- [Message Preview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/message-preview): Display quick message summaries in channel listings and notifications without loading full message content, optimizing performance and user experience.
- [Channel Unread Count](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/channel-unread-count): Track unread message counts at the channel level with real-time updates, total aggregation across channels, and mention status indicators for prioritized messaging.
- [Message Read Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/message-read-status): Mark individual messages as read and manage reading status for accurate unread count tracking with automatic detection and UI integration patterns.
- [Message Delivery Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/message-delivery-status): Track and manage message delivery confirmation, read receipts, and user engagement status in real-time chat applications with comprehensive delivery tracking capabilities.
- [Message Receipt Sync](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/message-receipt-sync): Manage real-time message receipt synchronization infrastructure for accurate read and delivery tracking with optimized resource usage and lifecycle management.

## Chat — Moderation

- [Channel Moderation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/content-moderation/channel-moderation)
- [Channel Rate-Limiting](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/content-moderation/channel-rate-limiting)
- [Ban/Unban a List of Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/member-management/ban-unban-a-list-of-channel-members): >-
- [Mute/Unmute a List of Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/member-management/mute-unmute-a-list-of-channel-members)
- [Roles and Permission](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/member-management/roles-and-permission)

## Social — Communities

- [Create Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/community-lifecycle/create-community): Create new communities with custom settings, privacy controls, post moderation, and metadata to build engaging spaces for your users
- [Update Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/community-lifecycle/update-community): Modify community settings, information, and configuration including display name, description, privacy settings, and post moderation
- [Delete Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/community-lifecycle/delete-community): Permanently delete communities and associated data with proper permissions and safety measures
- [Get Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/discovery/get-community): Retrieve community information including details, settings, and membership data for display and management
- [Query Communities](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/discovery/query-communities): Search and filter communities with advanced query capabilities including membership status, categories, and sorting options
- [Trending & Recommended Communities](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/discovery/trending-and-recommended-communities): Discover popular and personalized community recommendations to boost user engagement and drive community growth
- [Join Leave Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/membership/join-leave-community)
- [Query Community Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/membership/query-community-members)
- [Community Invitation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/membership/community-invitation)
- [Community Moderation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/governance/community-moderation)
- [Community Categories](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/organization/community-categories): Query and organize communities with categories for enhanced discovery and streamlined management

## Social — Posts

- [Text Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/text-post): Create simple text-based posts with mentions, hashtags, and rich formatting
- [Image Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/image-post): Create posts with single or multiple images, captions, and rich media support
- [Video Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/video-post): Create posts with video content, thumbnails, and rich media support
- [File Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/file-post): Create posts with file attachments like PDFs, documents, and other file formats
- [Custom Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/custom-post): Create custom post types with structured data for specialized content and unique user experiences
- [Get Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/get-post): Retrieve single or multiple posts with live object updates and comprehensive post data
- [Query Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/query-post): Search and filter posts with advanced querying capabilities for communities and user feeds
- [Edit Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/edit-post): Update and modify existing posts with support for text, image, video, and file content changes
- [Delete Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/delete-post): Delete posts with soft and hard deletion options for flexible content management
- [Flag & Unflag Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/flag-unflag-post): Report inappropriate content and manage community safety through comprehensive flagging functionality
- [Mentions in Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/mention-in-post): Tag users in posts to enhance engagement and foster community interaction with comprehensive mention functionality
- [Pinned Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/pinned-post): Highlight important content with pinned posts for announcements, featured content, and global visibility
- [Poll Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/poll-post): Create interactive poll posts to gather community feedback and engagement
- [Live Stream Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/live-stream-post): Create posts with live streaming capabilities for real-time community engagement
- [Post Review & Moderation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/post-review): Implement content moderation with post review workflows, approval systems, and feed management for community quality control

## Social — Feed

- [Get User Feed](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/feed/get-user-feed): Query user feed posts with community posts integration, enabling comprehensive user activity views across personal and community content
- [Query Global Feed](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/feed/query-global-feed)
- [Custom Post Ranking](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/feed/custom-post-ranking)

## Social — Comments

- [Create Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/create-comment): Build engaging comment systems with text, image comments, replies, and real-time optimistic updates for seamless user experience
- [Get Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/get-comment)
- [Query Comments](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/query-comment): Retrieve and filter comments with advanced querying, pagination, real-time updates, and comprehensive threading support
- [Edit Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/edit-comment)
- [Delete Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/delete-comment)
- [Flag & Unflag Comments](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/flag-unflag-comment): Comprehensive content moderation tools for reporting and managing inappropriate comments
- [Mentions in Comments](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/mention-in-comment): Implement user mentions in comments with autocomplete, notifications, custom rendering, and comprehensive mention management

## Social — Reactions

- [Add & Remove Reactions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/reactions/add-remove-reaction)
- [Query Reactions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/reactions/query-reactions)

## Social — Follow & User Relationships

- [Follow/Unfollow User](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/follow-unfollow-user): Implement follow and unfollow functionality for user relationships
- [Accept/Decline Follow Request](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/accept-decline-follow-request): Manage incoming follow requests with accept and decline actions, including multi-platform code examples.
- [Get Follower/Following List](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/get-follower-following-list): Retrieve and manage follower and following lists with real-time updates and filtering.
- [Get Connection Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/get-connection-status): Check relationship status between users and track connection counters with real-time updates
- [Block & Unblock User](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/blocking/block-unblock-user): How to block and unblock users, product behavior, and multi-platform code examples.
- [Manage Blocked Users](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/blocking/manage-blocked-users): How to view and manage your blocked users list, with multi-platform code examples.

## Social — Notifications

- [Query Notification Tray Item](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/query-notification-tray-item)
- [Mark Notification Tray Item Seen](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/mark-notification-tray-item-seen)
- [Mark Notification Tray Seen](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/mark-notification-tray-seen)
- [Get Notification Tray Seen](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/get-notification-tray-seen)
